mapper.select: SELECT ID, USERNAME, GROUP_NAME, API_KEY, REFRESH_TOKEN, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_USER WHERE USERNAME = #{username} AND IS_DEL = 'N'
SELECT ID, USERNAME, GROUP_NAME, API_KEY, REFRESH_TOKEN, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_USER WHERE USERNAME = #{username} AND IS_DEL = 'N'
SELECT ID, USERNAME, GROUP_NAME, API_KEY, REFRESH_TOKEN, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_USER WHERE IS_DEL = 'N' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMON.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER ( ID, USERNAME, GROUP_NAME, API_KEY, REFRESH_TOKEN, IS_DEL, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{username}, #{groupName}, #{apiKey}, #{refreshToken}, 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_USER SET USERNAME = #{username}, GROUP_NAME = #{groupName}, API_KEY = #{apiKey}, REFRESH_TOKEN = #{refreshToken}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TBL_USER SET IS_DEL = 'Y', DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}

mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, KEY_VALUE, ISSUED_BY, DESCRIPTION, EXPIRES_AT, LAST_USED_AT, IS_ACTIVE, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY WHERE KEY_VALUE = #{keyValue} AND IS_DEL = 'N'

SELECT ID, NAME, KEY_VALUE, ISSUED_BY, DESCRIPTION, EXPIRES_AT, LAST_USED_AT, IS_ACTIVE, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY WHERE IS_DEL = 'N' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMON.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY ( ID, NAME, KEY_VALUE, ISSUED_BY, DESCRIPTION, EXPIRES_AT, LAST_USED_AT, IS_ACTIVE, IS_DEL, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{keyValue}, #{issuedBy}, #{description}, #{expiresAt}, #{lastUsedAt}, 'Y', 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY SET NAME = #{name}, ISSUED_BY = #{issuedBy}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, EXPIRES_AT = #{expiresAt}, IS_ACTIVE = #{active, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TBL_CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY SET LAST_USED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TBL_CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY SET IS_DEL = 'Y', DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}

mapper.select: SELECT ID, LONG_URL, SHORT_URL, USER_ID, CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY_ID, EXPIRED_AT, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, BOT_TYPE, BOT_SERVICE_KEY, SURVEY_ID, SURVEY_VER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_SHORT_URL WHERE SHORT_URL = #{shortUrl} AND IS_DEL = 'N'
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TBL_SHORT_URL WHERE SHORT_URL = #{shortUrl} AND IS_DEL = 'N'

SELECT ID, LONG_URL, SHORT_URL, USER_ID, CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY_ID, EXPIRED_AT, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, BOT_TYPE, BOT_SERVICE_KEY, SURVEY_ID, SURVEY_VER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_SHORT_URL WHERE IS_DEL = 'N' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ID, LONG_URL, SHORT_URL, USER_ID, CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY_ID, EXPIRED_AT, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, BOT_TYPE, BOT_SERVICE_KEY, SURVEY_ID, SURVEY_VER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_SHORT_URL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DEL = 'N' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ID, LONG_URL, SHORT_URL, USER_ID, CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY_ID, EXPIRED_AT, IS_DEL, DELETED_AT, BOT_TYPE, BOT_SERVICE_KEY, SURVEY_ID, SURVEY_VER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM TBL_SHORT_URL WHERE ID = #{id} AND IS_DEL = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMON.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_SHORT_URL ( ID, LONG_URL, SHORT_URL, USER_ID, CLIENT_ACCESS_KEY_ID, EXPIRED_AT, IS_DEL, BOT_TYPE, BOT_SERVICE_KEY, SURVEY_ID, SURVEY_VER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{longUrl}, #{shortUrl}, #{user.id}, #{clientAccessKey.id}, #{expiredAt}, 'N', #{botType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{botServiceKey}, #{surveyId}, #{surveyVer}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SHORT_URL SET LONG_URL = #{longUrl}, EXPIRED_AT = #{expiredAt}, BOT_TYPE = #{botType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, BOT_SERVICE_KEY = #{botServiceKey}, SURVEY_ID = #{surveyId}, SURVEY_VER = #{surveyVer}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TBL_SHORT_URL SET IS_DEL = 'Y', DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}

mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMON.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY ( ID, SHORT_URL_ID, REFERER, USER_AGENT, IP, DEVICE_TYPE, OS, BROWSER, COUNTRY, CITY, REDIRECT_AT, BOT_TYPE, BOT_SERVICE_KEY, SURVEY_ID, SURVEY_VER ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{shortUrl.id}, #{referer}, #{userAgent}, #{ip}, #{deviceType}, #{os}, #{browser}, #{country}, #{city}, #{redirectAt}, #{botType, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{botServiceKey}, #{surveyId}, #{surveyVer} )
mapper.select: SELECT REFERER AS referer, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY REFERER ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT DEVICE_TYPE AS deviceType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY DEVICE_TYPE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT OS AS os, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY OS ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT BROWSER AS browser, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY BROWSER ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT COUNTRY AS country, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY COUNTRY ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM REDIRECT_AT) AS year, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM REDIRECT_AT) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM REDIRECT_AT) AS year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM REDIRECT_AT) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM REDIRECT_AT), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM REDIRECT_AT) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT TRUNC(REDIRECT_AT) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY TRUNC(REDIRECT_AT) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM REDIRECT_AT) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM REDIRECT_AT) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT
REFERER AS referer USER_AGENT AS userAgent DEVICE_TYPE AS deviceType OS AS os BROWSER AS browser COUNTRY AS country CITY AS city EXTRACT(YEAR FROM REDIRECT_AT) AS year EXTRACT(MONTH FROM REDIRECT_AT) AS month TRUNC(REDIRECT_AT) AS day EXTRACT(HOUR FROM REDIRECT_AT) AS hour
, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TBL_REDIRECTION_HISTORY WHERE SHORT_URL_ID = #{shortUrlId} GROUP BY
REFERER USER_AGENT DEVICE_TYPE OS BROWSER COUNTRY CITY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM REDIRECT_AT) EXTRACT(MONTH FROM REDIRECT_AT) TRUNC(REDIRECT_AT) EXTRACT(HOUR FROM REDIRECT_AT)
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
